channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Data Protection Concerns: South Korea Accuses DeepSeek of Sharing Citizens' Data with ByteDance
item.description: South Korea's Personal Information Protection Commission (PIPC) accuses DeepSeek, a Chinese AI chatbot, of sharing citizens' data with ByteDance. The allegations come as Western governments grow increasingly concerned about the processing of their citizens' data by such companies.
item.dc:creator: Major Digest

item.title: The EU's New Competition Commissioner: A Shift in Relations with the US
item.description: The European Union's new Competition Commissioner, Teresa Ribera, has announced a shift in relations with the US, emphasizing reliability and stability. The move comes as President Donald Trump has criticized the EU for its rules and regulations.
item.dc:creator: Major Digest
